title: Partner Marketing Lead B2B
description: Sei einer der ersten BewerberPartner Marketing Lead B2BLieferandoEinleitungReady for a challenge?Then Just Eat Takeaway.com might be the place for you. We’re a leading global online delivery platform, and our vision is to empower everyday convenience.Whether it’s a Friday-night feast, a post-gym poke bowl, or grabbing some groceries, our tech platform connects tens of millions of customers with hundreds of thousands of restaurant, grocery and convenience partners across the globe.As the Partner Marketing Lead for Germany, you are responsible to develop long-term local partner marketing strategies (B2B) and steer execution together with your direct reports. Your goal is to drive brand awareness via Partners & Couriers and grow partner quality and satisfaction. You will leverage your deep understanding of the local market and our partner landscape to identify and translate partner needs into actionable opportunities.You are a strategic business partner for partner-facing teams, working cross-functionally with sales teams, global partner marketing, and other relevant stakeholders. You will report directly to the Marketing Director for Germany while also having high exposure and interaction directly with the Germany Managing Director. This unique position offers the chance to work in an international company with a dynamic and rapidly changing environment. Flexibility, high resilience and a hands-on mentality are crucial for success in this role.You will be managing a team of 3 FTEs in our Berlin office (hybrid 3 days in office, 2 days home office).Ihre AufgabenThese are some of the key ingredients to the role:Develop annual / quarterly partner marketing plans aligned with overall business objectives, including budget management.Accelerate the mental availability of Lieferando through Last Mile visibility within the partner and courier ecosystem by setting up an activation plan with internal and external stakeholders.Evolve partner merchandise strategy & steer tactics around our partner webshopOwn mass communication towards our partner base, in order to support and lead partners effectively towards a successful partnershipOversee partner activations to enhance partner engagement, like our yearly Partner Awards Campaign and Partner and Courier facing events.Drive partner health, and adoption of growth tools through educational campaigns and sales support materialsManage and drive a variety of strategic and tactical partner-facing local projects in close collaboration with local and global stakeholders.Monitor and report on partner marketing KPIs. Leveraging to obtain insights to help guide future planning.Manage the German partner marketing budget in relation to KPIs.Lead key Partner growth and experience pilot projects, moving at speed to test and learn to influence future direction.Ihr ProfilWhat will you bring to the table?10+ years’ experience with B2B (trade) marketing in an FMCG and/or (food) tech environment or similarProven track record in a large global matrix structure, showing high proficiency in cross-functional collaboration and managing competing priorities across various departments.A data-driven and customer-centric way of working. You come up with new ideas, inspire others to innovate & coordinate efforts to turn plans into actionStrong interpersonal skills, working comfortably with internal & external partiesProven experience leading and developing teams, creating clarity, and empowering others to deliver strong outcomesStrategic thinking skills, strong in decision making, a test & learn approachCollaborative mindset - demonstrated project management experience with ability to manage and build consensus across diverse teamsStrong organisational and project management skills, with ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environmentProven analytical and quantitative skills, the ability to translate numbers into actionsOpen to business related travel to Amsterdam 1x month in averageNative German speaker, fluent in English.Wir bietenWhat We OfferLike a well-balanced recipe: your skills and our offer are the perfect match! Here's what you can expect from us:A competitive compensation packagethat recognises your performance – supported by a culture of open feedback and regular performance reviews.A permanent employment contractwith hybrid working options: three days per week in our Berlin-Kreuzberg office and two days working from the comfort of your home. (unless FTC is stated)Urban Sports Club membership– to help you recharge after work and keep a clear head.Extra perks: a monthly commuting allowance of €59 and a €90 monthly JET Pay credit so you can enjoy delicious meals delivered straight to your desk.Company pension schemewith a 20% employer contribution.A diverse and inclusive teamwith colleagues from over 99 nationalities and the opportunity to join our many communities and ERGs.Plenty of learning opportunitiesvia our Learning Hub, Bookboon, internal trainingSustainable work with purpose: contribute to our sustainability initiatives and work in our DGNB-certified office in Berlin.Shared experiences: after-work drinks, regular team events, social initiatives, and our summer and/ or winter parties.Design your own bike:individually adjusted to your body measurements, and lease it for 36 months interest-free, reducing your costs. At the end of the 36 months, you can buy the bike for about 10% of the RRP or lease a new bike.Weitere InformationenGehaltNeugierig auf das Gehalt für diesen Job?Gehalt anzeigenChart iconMin €Max €LieferandoIT & Tech • Nahrungs- & Genussmittel • 10000+ Mitarbeiter8JobsUnternehmensporträtPendelzeitVon:Nach:Wie:AutoÖPNVZu FußFahrradPendelzeit anzeigen- - : - -MitarbeitervorteileMitarbeiter-LaptopBetriebliche AltersvorsorgeFlexible ArbeitszeitenGute VerkehrsanbindungHomeofficeZeig weitereDie abgebildeten Mitarbeitervorteile sind unternehmensabhängig und können je nach Position und Abteilung abweichen.Mitarbeiter-LaptopBetriebliche AltersvorsorgeFlexible ArbeitszeitenGute VerkehrsanbindungHomeofficeFirmenevents- und VeranstaltungenEssenszulageParkplatzFirmenticketBalkonDie abgebildeten Mitarbeitervorteile sind unternehmensabhängig und können je nach Position und Abteilung abweichen.
